headline: GE Vernova Backlog Tied To AI Data Center Power Agreements
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) is supplying turbines for new natural gas power plants developed by Chevron and Engine No. 1 to support Microsoft’s AI focused data centers. The company reports a record backlog in its Power and Electrification segments, tied to projects for utilities and technology customers. Order activity reflects demand for electrification and grid modernization linked to rising AI and data infrastructure needs. For investors watching how AI affects real world infrastructure, GE...
